PCA

Erick Marroquín

2026-02-13

library(psych)
library(REdaS)
library(grid)
library(corrplot)
library(factoextra)

Carga de datos

# datos <- read.csv("sample-pca.csv")
datos <- read.csv("Ejemplo.csv")
str(datos)
## 'data.frame':    41 obs. of  8 variables:
##  $ Ciudad   : chr  "Phoenix" "Little Rock" "San Francisco" "Denver" ...
##  $ SO2      : num  10 13 12 17 56 36 29 14 10 24 ...
##  $ Neg.Temp : num  70.3 61 56.7 51.9 49.1 54 57.3 68.4 75.5 61.5 ...
##  $ Empresas : num  213 91 453 454 412 80 434 136 207 368 ...
##  $ Poblacion: num  582 132 716 515 158 80 757 529 335 497 ...
##  $ Viento   : num  6 8.2 8.7 9 9 9 9.3 8.8 9 9.1 ...
##  $ Precip   : num  7.05 48.52 20.66 12.95 43.37 ...
##  $ Dias     : num  36 100 67 86 127 114 111 116 128 115 ...

Exploración básica:

summary(datos)
##     Ciudad               SO2            Neg.Temp        Empresas     
##  Length:41          Min.   :  8.00   Min.   :43.50   Min.   :  35.0  
##  Class :character   1st Qu.: 13.00   1st Qu.:50.60   1st Qu.: 181.0  
##  Mode  :character   Median : 26.00   Median :54.60   Median : 347.0  
##                     Mean   : 30.05   Mean   :55.76   Mean   : 463.1  
##                     3rd Qu.: 35.00   3rd Qu.:59.30   3rd Qu.: 462.0  
##                     Max.   :110.00   Max.   :75.50   Max.   :3344.0  
##    Poblacion          Viento           Precip           Dias      
##  Min.   :  71.0   Min.   : 6.000   Min.   : 7.05   Min.   : 36.0  
##  1st Qu.: 299.0   1st Qu.: 8.700   1st Qu.:30.96   1st Qu.:103.0  
##  Median : 515.0   Median : 9.300   Median :38.74   Median :115.0  
##  Mean   : 608.6   Mean   : 9.444   Mean   :36.77   Mean   :113.9  
##  3rd Qu.: 717.0   3rd Qu.:10.600   3rd Qu.:43.11   3rd Qu.:128.0  
##  Max.   :3369.0   Max.   :12.700   Max.   :59.80   Max.   :166.0

Seleccionamos únicamente variables numéricas:

datos_num <- datos[, sapply(datos, is.numeric)]
head(datos_num)
##   SO2 Neg.Temp Empresas Poblacion Viento Precip Dias
## 1  10     70.3      213       582    6.0   7.05   36
## 2  13     61.0       91       132    8.2  48.52  100
## 3  12     56.7      453       716    8.7  20.66   67
## 4  17     51.9      454       515    9.0  12.95   86
## 5  56     49.1      412       158    9.0  43.37  127
## 6  36     54.0       80        80    9.0  40.25  114

Paso 0 - Análisis de viabilidad

KMO

KMO(datos_num)
## Kaiser-Meyer-Olkin factor adequacy
## Call: KMO(r = datos_num)
## Overall MSA =  0.43
## MSA for each item = 
##       SO2  Neg.Temp  Empresas Poblacion    Viento    Precip      Dias 
##      0.57      0.32      0.53      0.53      0.40      0.23      0.35

Esfericidad de Bartlett

bart_spher(datos_num)
##  Bartlett's Test of Sphericity
## 
## Call: bart_spher(x = datos_num)
## 
##      X2 = 198.584
##      df = 21
## p-value < 2.22e-16

Visualización de correlaciones

matriz <- cor(datos_num, use = "pairwise.complete.obs")
corrplot(matriz,
         method = "color",
         type = "upper",
         addCoef.col = "white",
         tl.col = "black",
         tl.srt = 45)

Paso 1 - Estandarización

datos_std <- scale(datos_num)
apply(datos_std, 2, mean)
##           SO2      Neg.Temp      Empresas     Poblacion        Viento 
##  8.665155e-17  7.094596e-16 -3.723309e-17  8.123583e-18 -8.827627e-16 
##        Precip          Dias 
##  2.518311e-16 -2.098592e-16
apply(datos_std, 2, sd)
##       SO2  Neg.Temp  Empresas Poblacion    Viento    Precip      Dias 
##         1         1         1         1         1         1         1

Paso 2 - PCA

compPrinc <- prcomp(datos_std)
summary(compPrinc)
## Importance of components:
##                           PC1    PC2    PC3    PC4     PC5     PC6     PC7
## Standard deviation     1.6517 1.2298 1.1811 0.9445 0.58888 0.31668 0.15973
## Proportion of Variance 0.3897 0.2160 0.1993 0.1274 0.04954 0.01433 0.00364
## Cumulative Proportion  0.3897 0.6058 0.8051 0.9325 0.98203 0.99636 1.00000

Scree Plot

fviz_eig(compPrinc)
## Warning in geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = barfill, color = barcolor, :
## Ignoring empty aesthetic: `width`.

Visualización de variables

fviz_pca_var(compPrinc,
             col.var = "cos2",
             gradient.cols = c("#00AFBB", "#E7B800", "#FC4E07"),
             repel = TRUE)
## Warning: Using `size` aesthetic for lines was deprecated in ggplot2 3.4.0.
